philosophy.note: Maida is a minimal behavioral application. Text serves as a permission slip, not a motivational quote.

default.interface: You may enter without knowing whether it is the right choice.

audit.notes: Explicitly removes the burden of correctness.

default.interface: This session does not need to justify itself.

audit.notes: Negates the need for productivity or meaning.

default.interface: Stopping early does not invalidate starting.

audit.notes: Removes the fear of sunk cost or commitment.

default.interface: A partial session is still a complete action.

audit.notes: Validates short or incomplete play sessions.

default.interface: Past inactivity creates no debt today.

audit.notes: Clears the psychological backlog guilt.

default.interface: You may look without playing, and that still counts.

audit.notes: Lowers the threshold of what counts as 'using' the game.

default.interface: You may arrive with only the energy you have.

audit.notes: Permits engagement during low-energy states.

default.interface: You may enter without having a goal.

audit.notes: Removes goal-oriented pressure.

default.interface: You may hesitate; that does not make this an error.

audit.notes: Validates the pause before action.

default.interface: You may be quiet before acting.

audit.notes: Reframes non-action as part of the UX.
Validates the Idle state without creating urgency.
Directly counters the psychological debt of the backlog.

idle_state.interface: You may intend to play without acting on it.

audit.notes: Decouples the desire to play from the execution of play.

idle_state.interface: Availability does not diminish with time.

audit.notes: Removes FOMO (Fear Of Missing Out) and time pressure.

idle_state.interface: No time is running out on you while you wait.

audit.notes: Administrative statement that urgency is artificial.
Validates doing nothing as a feature, not a bug.

idle_state.interface: Your library is not asking anything of you.

audit.notes: Neutralizes the 'pile of shame' effect.

idle_state.interface: The cost of waiting is zero.

audit.notes: Financial/Administrative framing of time.

idle_state.interface: What is available to you stays available.

audit.notes: Reassures that the game isn't going anywhere.

idle_state.interface: You do not need to signal readiness.

audit.notes: Removes the need to 'prove' readiness to play.

sekiro-shadows-die-twice.interface: Your hands remember what to do; thinking is optional.

audit.notes: Validates relying on muscle memory to lower cognitive load.

sekiro-shadows-die-twice.interface: Defeat is just a loop, not a verdict on your skill.

audit.notes: Removes the ego-cost of failure.

the-first-berserker-khazan.interface: Combat here is rhythmic. Aggression and patience alternate at the same frequency.

audit.notes: Fixed: removed imperative 'Surrender' and negative framing of hesitation.

lords-of-the-fallen.interface: Reaching a checkpoint is a valid session boundary.

audit.notes: Fixed: removed value elevation ('complete victory'), reframed as administrative boundary.

eastern-exorcist.interface: Left or right. The movement plane is flat; the next obstacle is always in view.

audit.notes: Fixed: removed directive ('just clear') and subjective difficulty claim ('simple').

eldest-souls.interface: There is only one target. Nothing else demands your attention.

audit.notes: Focuses on reducing the scope of responsibility.

factorio.interface: You can leave it unfinished and return with the current state intact.

audit.notes: Acknowledges the system without imposing immediate duty.

factorio.interface: Placing a single belt counts as a complete session.

audit.notes: Redefines 'complete' to a minimal atomic unit.

death-stranding.interface: Moving forward is the only requirement. No combat needed.

audit.notes: Explicitly removes a specific stressor (combat).

death-stranding.interface: Isolation is the game's state. Other players' traces remain present in the environment.

audit.notes: Fixed: replaced emotional reassurance with factual system description.

frostpunk.interface: The cold is in the screen, not in the room. Crisis is simulated.

audit.notes: Fixed: replaced 'You are safe' soothing with factual restatement of kernel.

frostpunk.interface: You can pause the city's needs at any moment.

audit.notes: Reinforces user agency and the ability to stop.

disco-elysium.interface: You can move through it one line, thought, or check at a time.

audit.notes: Lowers the barrier to entry (sobriety/intelligence requirements).

disco-elysium.interface: A missed check still opens a valid path through the scene.

audit.notes: Validates failure/error as a legitimate state.

minds-beneath-us.interface: The narrative advances on input. Choices shape direction without binding it.

audit.notes: Fixed: removed directive 'Watch', reframed as system description.

norco.interface: Atmosphere is the primary content here. Analysis is not required.

audit.notes: Fixed: removed directive 'Soak in', replaced with factual content description.

the-vale.interface: Vision is not the primary input channel here. The world is constructed in audio.

audit.notes: Fixed: removed all direct instructions, replaced with factual description of game mechanics.

ghost-of-tsushima-directors-cut.interface: Follow the wind or don't. The map does not demand completion.

audit.notes: Validates non-action ('or don't').

final-fantasy-xvi.interface: You can handle the inputs while the screen carries the spectacle.

audit.notes: Reduces the user's role to mechanical input.

god-of-war.interface: The way forward is clear. You cannot get lost.

audit.notes: Removes the anxiety of navigation failure.

lies-of-p.interface: Precision has no time limit. The window is the same on every attempt.

audit.notes: Fixed: replaced predictive reassurance with factual system property.

action-taimanin.interface: Combat resolves at high speed. Input requirements are minimal.

audit.notes: Fixed: removed marketing language and directive, reframed as factual system description.

detention.interface: The horror is paced by your input. Nothing advances without deliberate action.

audit.notes: Fixed: removed emotional reassurance, replaced with factual description of pacing mechanic.

soma.interface: You are observing a philosophy problem, not solving it.

audit.notes: Reframes the user's role from solver to observer.

stardew-valley.interface: Crops continue on their own. You can stop after a short in-game day.

audit.notes: Validates short sessions and removes consequence anxiety.

timberborn.interface: Water systems respond slowly. You can leave them running without constant input.

audit.notes: Administrative confirmation of control.

this-war-of-mine.interface: Each in-game day is a discrete unit. One day is sufficient.

audit.notes: Fixed: removed value elevation ('victory') and directive, reframed as administrative boundary.

returnal.interface: Death is part of progress here. You are entering a reset loop, not a skill loss.

audit.notes: Reframes failure as a valid system state.

dave-the-diver.interface: One dive is a complete experience.

audit.notes: Defines a small unit of play as sufficient.

balatro.interface: You can play a single hand and let the scoring resolve it.

audit.notes: Offloads cognitive burden ('math handles itself').

slay-the-spire.interface: The enemy waits for your turn forever.

audit.notes: Emphasizes the lack of time pressure.

va-11-hall-a.interface: Music plays. Service is the mechanic. High stakes are not a feature here.

audit.notes: Fixed: removed directives ('Listen', 'mix'), reframed as factual system description.

metro-2033-redux.interface: The tunnels are linear. Environmental hazards are managed through equipment.

audit.notes: Fixed: removed dramatic directive, replaced with factual description of structure and mechanics.

no-mans-sky.interface: You can just drift. The universe is too big to complete.

audit.notes: Validates aimlessness ('just drift') and negates completionism.

gris.interface: There is no fail state here. You can keep moving without penalty.

audit.notes: States a system fact ('no fail state'). 'Just move' is borderline but functional.

far-lone-sails.interface: The engine is the primary interaction. Forward motion is the result.

audit.notes: Fixed: removed directive ('Keep'), replaced with factual description of interaction loop.

the-last-campfire.interface: There is no time limit here. You can stay with one puzzle as long as you want.

audit.notes: Removes time pressure.

abzu.interface: You stay afloat here. Underwater movement is not a drowning timer.

audit.notes: States a system safety fact.

dwarf-fortress.interface: A fallen fortress still produces events, records, and aftermath.

audit.notes: Reframes 'disaster' as neutral output.

rain-world.interface: Scale is part of the design. Concealment is a primary mechanic.

audit.notes: Fixed: removed emotional validation and directive, reframed as design description.

bionic-bay.interface: You can run a trial, observe the result, and reset for another attempt.

audit.notes: Neutralizes failure.

alans-automaton-workshop.interface: The nodes do not move until you tell them to.

audit.notes: Affirms the user's control over time.

20-minutes-till-dawn.interface: 10 minutes or 20 minutes. The end is guaranteed.

audit.notes: Defines a fixed endpoint, reducing uncertainty.

metal-bringer.interface: Crowd density is the primary variable. Feedback is immediate.

audit.notes: Fixed: removed directive and engagement optimization, reframed as system description.

city-lights-love-bites-season-0.interface: Each scene ends on player input. The story advances at a deliberate pace.

audit.notes: Fixed: removed UI instruction and promised experience, replaced with factual pacing description.

viscera-cleanup-detail.interface: Cleaning one spot is permanent progress.

audit.notes: Validates minimal effort.

clair-obscur-expedition-33.interface: No prior series knowledge is required. The world context is embedded in the narrative.

audit.notes: Fixed: removed dramatic directive, replaced with factual statement of entry requirement.

default_action.interface: The game accepts input without prior planning.

audit.notes: Fixed: removed aphorism, replaced with factual administrative permission statement.

default_narrative.interface: The next page does not turn until you are ready.

audit.notes: Confirms user control over pacing.

time-of-day.interface: You may enter before the mind has reached full speed.

audit.notes: Mechanism: normalizes sleep inertia and partial readiness after waking; source: Wertz et al., 'Effects of sleep inertia on cognition,' JAMA (2006), doi:10.1001/jama.295.2.163.

time-of-day.interface: You may open this without turning the first hour into a test.

audit.notes: Mechanism: lowers self-judgment around imperfect starts using self-compassion/common-humanity framing; source: Neff, 'Self-Compassion: An Alternative Conceptualization of a Healthy Attitude Toward Oneself' (2003), doi:10.1080/15298860309032.

time-of-day.interface: You may use a lower-focus hour without treating it as a failure.

audit.notes: Mechanism: normalizes the midafternoon drop in alertness as circadian rather than personal failure; source: Monk, 'The post-lunch dip in performance,' Clin Sports Med (2005), doi:10.1016/j.csm.2004.12.002.

time-of-day.interface: You may enter without closing every loop the day left behind.

audit.notes: Mechanism: lowers completion pressure at the work-to-leisure boundary using psychological detachment framing; source: Sonnentag and Bayer, 'Switching off mentally: predictors and consequences of psychological detachment from work during off-job time' (2005), doi:10.1037/1076-8998.10.4.393.

time-of-day.interface: You may open the launcher without owing the night a full session.

audit.notes: Mechanism: reduces all-or-nothing commitment pressure in the time window associated with bedtime procrastination and self-regulation conflict; source: Kroese et al., 'Bedtime procrastination: introducing a new area of procrastination,' Front Psychol (2014), doi:10.3389/fpsyg.2014.00611.

emotional-states.interface: You may leave this unresolved; repeated skips do not create a duty to force closure.

audit.notes: Mechanism: after setbacks, pressure and self-blame can amplify rumination and negative affect; permission reduces closure pressure rather than demanding persistence. Source: Semenchuk et al., 2018, J Sport Exerc Psychol, PMID:29580155; Emmerich et al., 2020, Eur J Pain, PMID:33448520.

emotional-states.interface: You may meet this with partial attention; late hours do not create a higher standard.

audit.notes: Mechanism: sleep loss commonly impairs feedback-based updating and decision-making, so lowering the performance demand fits the state. Source: Whitney et al., 2015, Sleep, PMID:25515105; Saini et al., 2025, scoping review, PMCID:PMC12189852.

emotional-states.interface: You may return without warmth, curiosity, or urgency; contact may remain neutral.

audit.notes: Mechanism: emotional numbing/blunting is associated with reduced emotional reactivity, so requiring felt enthusiasm would misread the state. Source: Jin et al., 2015, Int J Psychophysiol, PMID:25931112; Dewe et al., 2016, Cogn Neuropsychiatry, PMID:27466978.

emotional-states.interface: You may leave this exactly as it is; satisfaction does not create a next step.

audit.notes: Mechanism: contentment is a low-arousal positive state linked in theory to safety, certainty, low effort, and even doing nothing, so the permission blocks needless escalation. Source: Fredrickson, 2001, Am Psychol, PMCID:PMC3156001.

emotional-states.interface: You may pass through briefly; unfinishedness may remain unfinished.

audit.notes: Mechanism: restlessness is classically described as an urge to move or inability to stay still, so demanding settled focus would add friction. Source: Tan and Ondo, 2001, Int J Clin Pract, PMID:11452680.

emotional-states.interface: You may continue after the freeze without accounting for the gap.

audit.notes: Mechanism: freezing is a defensive state tied to temporary immobility, and adaptive coping includes timely termination when threat is gone or action is needed; the permission removes explanatory debt at re-entry. Source: Niermann et al., 2017, Psychoneuroendocrinology, PMID:28511048; Rosler and Gamer, 2019, Sci Rep, doi:10.1038/s41598-019-53683-4.

emotional-states.interface: You may look without choosing; multiple open options do not need to collapse into one.

audit.notes: Mechanism: larger option sets can, under some conditions, reduce motivation to choose or satisfaction, so removing the demand to collapse options can lower pressure. Source: Scheibehenne et al., 2010, J Consum Res, doi:10.1086/651235.

return-after-absence.interface: After a short gap, you may re-enter without restoring the previous rhythm.

audit.notes: Mechanism: brief absence weakens cue-driven automaticity, so immediate smoothness should not be required. Source: Stojanovic et al., Front Psychol 2022, PMCID: PMC9226889.

return-after-absence.interface: After a month-scale gap, you may return without proving memory, skill, or narrative continuity.

audit.notes: Mechanism: disrupted context weakens habitual responding, so recall friction is normal rather than disqualifying. Source: Thomas et al., PLoS One 2016, PMCID: PMC4847906.

return-after-absence.interface: After several months away, you may treat this as a new contact instead of a resumed streak.

audit.notes: Mechanism: longer context discontinuity breaks old cue chains, making a fresh-contact frame more accurate than seamless continuation. Source: Thomas et al., PLoS One 2016, PMCID: PMC4847906.

return-after-absence.interface: After half a year away, you may enter without matching the tempo, plans, or competence from before.

audit.notes: Mechanism: old automaticity and contextual fluency decay across long gaps; lowering restart pressure also avoids guilt-reactivity after lapses. Sources: Stojanovic et al., Front Psychol 2022, PMCID: PMC9226889; Thogersen-Ntoumani et al., Br J Health Psychol 2021, PMCID: PMC8451927.

return-after-absence.interface: After a year or more, you may approach this title without inheriting the standards of your earlier self.

audit.notes: Mechanism: extended discontinuity weakens old habit-context links enough that identity continuity should not be assumed. Source: Thomas et al., PLoS One 2016, PMCID: PMC4847906.

return-after-absence.interface: When no last-played record exists, you may begin without reconstructing history, sequence, or proof of prior use.

audit.notes: Mechanism: missing telemetry functions like context discontinuity, so proof of continuity should not be demanded. Sources: Stojanovic et al., Front Psychol 2022, PMCID: PMC9226889; Thomas et al., PLoS One 2016, PMCID: PMC4847906.

return-after-absence.interface: After a once-anchored period ended in long absence, you may return without reactivating the old level of investment.

audit.notes: Mechanism: burnout is marked by exhaustion, distance, and reduced efficacy; permission removes pressure to resume prior intensity, while self-compassion is inversely associated with burnout. Sources: WHO ICD-11 burn-out FAQ; Hashem & Zeinoun, Mindfulness 2020, PMCID: PMC7481342.
